content:
FRICTION: Skill prompt suggests yq merge syntax that does not exist on yq v4

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: yq-merge
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: med
evidence:
  - artifacts/core/skills/architect/SKILL.md:42
suggestion: Replace `yq m -i` with `yq eval-all '. as $i ireduce ...'`.

FRICTION: yq merge example produced an empty file

writer_agent: gemini-cli
subcategory: yq-merge
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: med
evidence: https://example.com/ci-run/12345
suggestion: Same fix — eval-all reduce form.

FRICTION: gh CLI silently truncates very long PR bodies

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: gh-body-truncation
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: high
evidence:
  - https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig/pull/40#issuecomment-XXX
suggestion: Detect length > 65535 and chunk into a follow-up comment.

FRICTION: Solo low-severity friction with no cluster mate

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: parked-singleton
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: low
evidence:
  - some-file.md:1
suggestion: Will accumulate in subsequent runs.
Not a friction at all — random text the curator should skip.

FRICTION: Empty writer_agent — must be rejected per schema

writer_agent:
subcategory: should-be-rejected
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: med
evidence:
  - foo.md:1

FRICTION: Already-correlated friction must be skipped by the curator

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: stale-resolved-fixture
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: high
evidence:
  - artifacts/library/skills/harness-curator/scripts/apply.py:99
suggestion: Skip on truthy opened_as.
opened_as: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig/issues/99

FRICTION: Whitespace-only suggestion must be rejected

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: empty-suggestion-test
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: low
evidence:
  - test-file.md:1
suggestion:

FRICTION: No canonical target — cluster must route-fail visibly

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: no-canonical-test
severity: high
evidence:
  - test-file.md:3
suggestion: Supply --target-repo or add canonical: to the drawer.

FRICTION: Empty block scalar suggestion must be rejected

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: empty-block-scalar
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: med
evidence:
  - test-file.md:4
suggestion: |

FRICTION: Multi-line block-scalar suggestion must survive intact

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: block-scalar-multiline
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: high
evidence:
  - block-scalar-test.md:11
suggestion: |
  First line of the multi-line suggestion.
  Second line that must also survive.
  Third line MARKER-SUGG-TAIL ends the block.

FRICTION: Correlated drawer with block-scalar suggestion is resolved

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: resolved-block-scalar
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: high
evidence:
  - resolved-test.md:1
suggestion: |
  This correlated drawer still has a real multi-line suggestion.
  It must be classified resolved, not empty.
opened_as: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig/issues/100

FRICTION: Correlated drawer with empty suggestion is resolved not empty_suggestion

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: resolved-empty-suggestion
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: high
evidence:
  - resolved-empty-test.md:1
suggestion:   
opened_as: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig/issues/101

FRICTION: Block-scalar capture generalizes beyond the suggestion field

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: block-scalar-generalized
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: high
context: |
  Context first line establishing the scenario.
  Context second line MARKER-CTX-TAIL closes it.
evidence:
  - generalized-test.md:7
suggestion: Inline one-line suggestion stays correctly parsed.

FRICTION: Literal-strip block-scalar indicator must be parsed correctly

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: block-scalar-strip
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: high
evidence:
  - strip-variant-test.md:1
suggestion: |-
  First line with strip indicator.
  Second line MARKER-STRIP-TAIL closes the block.

FRICTION: Folded block-scalar indicator must be parsed correctly

writer_agent: claude-code
subcategory: block-scalar-folded
canonical: https://github.com/crewrig/crewrig
severity: high
evidence:
  - folded-variant-test.md:1
suggestion: >
  First folded line.
  Second folded line MARKER-FOLD-TAIL closes the block.
